name: PetVivo Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview PetVivo Holdings, Inc. (the Company, PetVivo, we or us) is an emerging biomedical device company focused on the manufacturing, commercialization, and licensing of innovative medical devices and therapeutics for animals. The Company has a pipeline of eighteen products for the treatment of animals and humans.
